title: Union-Find: path compression gives one-step find
statement_informal: After path compression points x directly to its root r, find reaches r in a single step -- the mechanism behind path compression's speedup. (The full inverse-Ackermann amortized bound is a major separate formalization.)

cost_model.notes: After compression, find is one step; full O(alpha(n)) amortized is a separate research effort.

references: Tarjan (1975) — efficiency of a good but not linear set union algorithm (inverse Ackermann).
